message.content:
Read the following files and return their complete contents:
1. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie\services\generator.ts (or similar file that uses Gemini)
2. C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test - Test Copie\types.ts

I need to understand:
- How Gemini API is called (import pattern, API key handling, fallback simulation)
- The existing type definitions
- The pattern for credit deduction

Return the full content of both files.

content.text: I'll read both files for you to understand the Gemini API implementation and type definitions.
